title: Brian Augustyn

'''Brian Augustyn''' (d. [[February 1]], [[2022]]<ref name="Death" />) is a comic book editor and writer who wrote the comic "[[Lucky Stars]]."

During the late 1980s and early 1990s he was an editor for [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC Comics]] where he edited [[Wikipedia:Flash (comics)|''The Flash'']], [[Wikipedia:Justice League|''Justice League'']] and the [[Wikipedia:!mpact_Comics|!mpact Comics]] line of titles. He discovered his love of comics with DC's [[Wikipedia:Showcase (comics)|''Showcase'']] #4, which starred The Flash.

As a writer he has worked on titles such as [[Wikipedia:Batman: Gotham by Gaslight|''Batman: Gotham by Gaslight'']] and it's sequel [[Wikipedia:Batman: Gotham by Gaslight|Batman: Master of the Future]], ''The Flash'', [[Wikipedia:Imperial Guard (comics)|''Imperial Guard'']], [[Wikipedia:Out There (comics)|''Out There'']], [[Wikipedia:Crimson (comics)|''Crimson'']], and [[Wikipedia:Mega Man (comic book)|''Mega Man'']]. He has been recognized for his work in the industry with the Wizard Fan Award for Favorite Editor in 1994. Currently, he is the Managing Editor for [[Wikipedia:Visionary Comics Studio|Visionary Comics Studio]].
